query:
-- Pegar todos os IDs envolvidos nas duplicidades restantes (mesmo bairro)
-- e verificar quais não têm Instagram
WITH duplicate_pairs AS (
  SELECT e1.id as id1, e1.name as name1, e1.instagram as ig1, e1.address as addr1, e1.address_number as num1, e1.neighborhood as bairro1,
         e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.instagram as ig2
  FROM establishments e1
  JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address 
    AND e1.address_number = e2.address_number 
    AND e1.id < e2.id
    AND e1.address IS NOT NULL 
    AND e1.address != ''
    AND e1.address_number IS NOT NULL
    AND e1.address_number != ''
    AND e1.neighborhood = e2.neighborhood
  WHERE (
    LOWER(e1.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e2.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(e2.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e1.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
  )
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pares,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_ig1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_ig2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = '') AND (ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ambos_sem_ig
FROM duplicate_pairs;

         e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.instagram as ig2
  FROM establishments e1
  JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address 
    AND e1.address_number = e2.address_number 
    AND e1.id < e2.id
    AND e1.address IS NOT NULL 
    AND e1.address != ''
    AND e1.address_number IS NOT NULL
    AND e1.address_number != ''
    AND e1.neighborhood = e2.neighborhood
  WHERE (
    LOWER(e1.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e2.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(e2.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e1.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
  )
)

  SUM(CASE WHEN ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_ig1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_ig2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = '') AND (ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ambos_sem_ig
FROM duplicate_pairs;
